name: Honor Among Thieves
description: Fenrick needs help escorting smuggled children to safety on the Eastern Road. The Ironmarch patrols are closing in.

DISCOVERED.journal_entry: Fenrick let something slip — the Guild isn't just about coin. They're smuggling orphaned children out of Ironmarch territory to a safe house on the Eastern Road.

ACTIVE.journal_entry: I agreed to help Fenrick escort three children through the Eastern Road to a Guild safe house. Ironmarch patrols have been increasing — we need to move at night.
objectives: Meet Fenrick at the village gate after dark (22:00)
Escort the children along the Eastern Road
Reach the safe house at Crow's Rest

ESCORT_BEGUN.journal_entry: We're on the road. Three children — the oldest can't be more than twelve. Fenrick is tense. He says there are at least two patrol routes between us and the safe house.
objectives: Navigate past the first patrol checkpoint
Cross the stone bridge without being seen

THORNWOOD_DETOUR.journal_entry: I led the group through Thornwood instead. It's longer and the forest is hostile, but there are no Ironmarch soldiers among the trees. The children are terrified.
objectives: Guide the children through Thornwood safely

COMPLETED_SUCCESS.journal_entry: The children are safe at Crow's Rest. Fenrick actually smiled — the first real smile I've seen from him. 'The Hand protects its own,' he said. For once, I believed him.

COMPLETED_CAUGHT.journal_entry: Ironmarch caught us. The children were taken. Fenrick was arrested. He looked at me like it was my fault. Maybe it was.

COMPLETED_BETRAYED_GUILD.journal_entry: I told the Ironmarch patrol about the escort route. They paid well. Fenrick will never know it was me — unless he does.

COMPLETED_THORNWOOD_SUCCESS.journal_entry: The forest route was harrowing but the children made it. Fenrick was furious about the risk but grateful for the result. The Warden watched us pass — I felt it.

COMPLETED_THORNWOOD_LOSS.journal_entry: One of the children wandered off the path. The forest took her. Fenrick is inconsolable. We saved two, but lost one to my decision.
